errors.fanvueInvalidUser: Fanvue user unavailable: account deleted or blocked on the platform.
errors.gatewayTimeout: Gateway or proxy timed out waiting for the server. Long generation may still have finished — refresh and check Saved / Recent videos.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable (503). Try again in a minute.
errors.serverError: Server error ({{status}}{{statusText}}). Retry later or refresh the page.
errors.abortHintLong: Long generation may have finished on the server — refresh and check Saved and Recent videos.
errors.networkFailed: No response from server (network, VPN, firewall or backend restart). Check connection. If you just started generation — refresh after reconnect and check archive.
errors.genericTailLong: Refresh the page — finished video or frame may already be in history.
errors.genericTail: Refresh the page and retry if needed.
